fieldValues.value: When LiMoMa closes — whether at the end of the pilot, by group decision, or by necessity — the group will: (1) return all artworks to their makers within a reasonable period; (2) remove or make good all fixings and mounts; (3) leave no unresolved commitments to artists, the building, or third parties; (4) transfer any remaining shared funds to the Party Utility for building improvement. The Clerk is responsible for ensuring these obligations are discharged and recorded.
Ending cleanly is a commitment we make to artists before they show with us, not something we work out at the end. This article makes that commitment concrete.
Unanimous agreement of all current members.
